{{Missing Info|specifics=Source, Relic Resonances, Mirage name & final rewards, Mirage 1-3, Description}}
{{CargoRelic
|name=History of Time
|available=0
|rank=SSS
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=
|fame=66
|art=48
|fth=75
|civ=64
|tech=109
|ss1=Snail HP +300<br>Per 8 Rift Apostles dominated, Snail DEF +9<br>Per 8 Rift Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +9<br>Rift Apostles Dominated: 160/160
|ss2=Snail HP +400<br>Per 8 Rift Apostles dominated, Snail DEF +12<br>Per 8 Rift Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +12<br>Rift Apostles Dominated: 160/160
|ss3=Snail HP +500<br>Per 8 Rift Apostles dominated, Snail DEF +15<br>Per 8 Rift Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +15<br>Rift Apostles Dominated: 160/160
|ss4=Snail HP +700<br>Per 8 Rift Apostles dominated, Snail DEF +21<br>Per 8 Rift Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +21<br>Rift Apostles Dominated: 160/160
|ss5=Snail HP +900<br>Per 8 Rift Apostles dominated, Snail DEF +27<br>Per 8 Rift Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +27<br>Rift Apostles Dominated: 160/160
|ss6=Snail HP +1200<br>Per 8 Rift Apostles dominated, Snail DEF +36<br>Per 8 Rift Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +36<br>Rift Apostles Dominated: 160/160
|ss7=Snail HP +1200<br>Per 8 Rift Apostles dominated, Snail DEF +36<br>Per 8 Rift Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +36<br>Rift Apostles Dominated: 160/160<br>Snail HP +1000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]] Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, Snail HP +6000
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]] Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, Water DMG +300
|skill3=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]] Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, Earth DMG +300
|mirage={{Mirage|name=|reward=
|3name=|3rec=|3atk=|3def=|3hp=|3weak=
|4name=|4rec=|4atk=|4def=|4hp=|4weak=
|5name=|5rec=|5atk=|5def=|5hp=|5weak=
|6name=|6rec=|6atk=|6def=|6hp=|6weak=
|Arec=|Aatk=|Adef=|Ahp=|Aweak=
}}
}}

[[Category:Minion DEF Boost]]
[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Gaia Tech Points]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:DEF Boost]]
[[Category:Rift Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Rift Exploration Boost]]
